title: App Settings - General - Licenses - License Link (MIT,Apache2.0.....)
scenario: Verify license links in App Settings > General > Licenses display correct view with headline, description, and Cancel (X) button, and licenses are present in Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements
steps: Tap each license link (e.g., MIT, Apache 2.0, etc.)
Observe the displayed view for each license
Verify the view contains a headline
Verify the view contains a description
Verify the view contains a Cancel (X) button in the upper right corner
Verify the same licenses (MIT, Apache 2.0, etc.) are listed
expected: Tapping each license link in App Settings > General > Licenses displays a view with a headline, description, and a Cancel (X) button in the upper right corner. The same licenses are also present in Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements.
